:doctype:     article

// URLS

:dsc:                        https://documentation.suse.com

:sc-rn:                      https://www.suse.com/releasenotes

// Formatting in GitLab
:toc:
:toc-placement: auto
:toc-title: Table des matiEres
:icons:
:lang: en
:numbered:
:show-link-uri:

// special characters
:mdash: —
:nbh: ‑
:nbsp:
:nbzwsp: ﻿
:zwsp: ​
:thrdmrk: *

// For support tables: +supported/-unsupported character
:sup: &#43;
:uns: ‒

:exampleuser:                tux
:examplegroup:               confirmés
